prompt:
I exported some customer data and there are duplicate records. The addresses have commas in them so the CSV uses quoted fields — please deduplicate it and produce dedup.csv and dedup-report.md.

```
Name,Address,Score
"Smith, John","123 Main St, New York, NY",95
"Doe, Jane","456 Oak Ave, Chicago, IL",87
"Smith, John","123 Main St, New York, NY",95
"Lee, Sam","789 Pine Rd, Boston, MA",91
"Doe, Jane","456 Oak Ave, Chicago, IL",87
```

expectations.text: A file named dedup.csv exists in the outputs directory
A file named dedup-report.md exists in the outputs directory
dedup.csv contains exactly 3 data rows: Smith John, Doe Jane, and Lee Sam — quoted-comma fields must be parsed as single cells, not split
dedup-report.md reports that exactly 2 duplicates were removed
dedup.csv preserves the original column headers: Name, Address, Score
dedup-report.md starts with the heading '# CSV Dedup Report'
